top_signals.title: Japan’s Inpex Signs 15-Year Deal to Buy Persian Gulf LNG
top_signals.summary: Japan’s state-backed Inpex Corp. signed a 15-year deal with Abu Dhabi National Oil Co. for the supply of liquefied natural gas from its project in the Persian Gulf.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Japan 30-Year Bond Sale Sees Strongest Demand Since 2019
top_signals.summary: Japan’s 30-year government bond auction drew its strongest demand since 2019 as high yield levels attracted investors despite worries about fiscal policy and inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin miner TeraWulf soars on a $19 billion AI data-center lease with Anthropic
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Former Tether CIO seeks to sell stake in stablecoin issuer, Bloomberg reports
top_signals.summary: The reported transaction comes as Tether maintains it has no plans to go public, even as other crypto companies pursue or delay IPOs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Japan ultra-fast maglev train project advances on key construction approval
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: The copper the world needs is already above ground
top_signals.summary: Copper tailings processing offers a faster, cleaner way to help close the global copper supply gap as electrification and AI drive demand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
